code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let s_opt = io.read_line()
  let s = match s_opt
  when Some(line)
    line
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n_opt = io.read_line()
  let n_str = match n_opt
  when Some(line)
    line
  when None
    "0"
  end

  let n_parsed = string.parse_int(n_str)
  let n = match n_parsed
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end

  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    result = "#{result}#{s}"
    i = i + 1
  end

  println(result)
  Ok(())
end
